summary: A Go-based testing and validation framework utilizing AI agents for extensive test generation and MCP integration.
concerns: high volume of auto-generated extra test files from glm-agents may clutter the codebase
staged changes during active agent sessions could lead to merge conflicts
potential test duplication between baseline and agent-generated tests
suggestions: consolidate or archive completed glm-agent test sessions to reduce directory noise
review and deduplicate agent-generated tests against the baseline test suite
ensure the new string sanitization feature in observer has full test coverage
